stat_block.text: This staff of magically hardened wood is topped with a silver sculpture depicting magical runic symbols. A staff of arcane might is a *+1 striking staff*.

traits.name: Rare
traits.text: This rarity indicates that a rules element is very difficult to find in the game world. A rare feat, spell, item or the like is available to players only if the GM decides to include it in the game, typically through discovery during play. Creatures with this trait are rare. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creatures is increased by 5.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Staff
traits.text: This magic item holds spells of a particular theme and allows a spellcaster to cast additional spells by preparing the staff.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: You destroy the staff, unleashing a blast of arcane power in a 30- foot cone, dealing 2d6 force damage per charge remaining in the staff with a DC 30 basic Reflex save.

traits.name: Death
traits.text: An effect with the death trait kills you immediately if it reduces you to 0 HP. Some death effects can bring you closer to death or slay you outright without reducing you to 0 HP.

traits.name: Force
traits.text: Effects with this trait deal force damage or create objects made of pure magical force.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

stat_block.craft_requirements: Supply one casting of all listed ranks of all listed spells.

variants.name: Staff of Arcane Might
variants.text:
* Cantrip detect magic
* 1st phantasmal minion
* 2nd everlight
* 3rd force barrage , paralyze
* 4th dispelling globe , mystic armor , translocate
* 5th fireball , force barrage, lightning bolt

variants.name: Greater Staff of Arcane Might
variants.text:
A greater staff of arcane might is a +2 greater striking staff . Sunder deals 2d8 force damage per charge and is DC 35. 
* 6th disintegrate , mystic armor, wall of force
* 7th howling blizzard , fireball, lightning bolt

variants.name: Major Staff of Arcane Might
variants.text:
A major staff of arcane might is a + 3 greater striking staff . Sunder deals 2d10 force damage per charge and is DC 40. 
* 8th mystic armor, wall of force
* 9th dispel magic , falling stars , howling blizzard
